summary: After a brief blue-dot intro graphic, the video is C-SPAN2 White House Briefing footage of Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt at the podium discussing unaccompanied migrant children. It is a recorded press-briefing clip with lower-third captions and no music or narration overlay.
notable_text: Chyrons: 'Karoline Leavitt - White House Press Secretary'; 'PRESS SECRETARY HOLDS FIRST BRIEFING SINCE U.S. STRIKES ON IRAN'; THE WHITE HOUSE / C-SPAN2 bugs.
